title: Ethiopian Sausage Stew
description: A spicy and flavorful stew originating from Ethiopia, made with sausages and a blend of spices. Serve with injera or rice for a complete meal.

ingredients.name: Sausages
ingredients.notes: Any type of sausage works, such as Ethiopian-inspired or classic breakfast sausage

ingredients.name: Ethiopian
ingredients.notes: Berbere spice blend, available at most African or Middle Eastern markets

ingredients.name: stew
ingredients.notes: Diced tomatoes for added moisture and flavor

ingredients.name: sour cream
ingredients.notes: Optional topping for a tangy kick

ingredients.name: salt and pepper
ingredients.notes: Season to taste for added depth

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: For thinning the stew to desired consistency

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Add sausages and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add onion and garlic to pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add Berbere spice and cook for 1 minute.
Add diced tomatoes, water, and browned sausages to pot.
Bring stew to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with sour cream and injera or rice on the side.
